jobs.title: Senior Product Manager, Search
jobs.content:
We are looking for a Senior PM to lead our Search & Discovery team.

You will own the roadmap for our core search product, working with ML engineers to improve relevance and personalization. We sponsor H-1B visas for qualified candidates.

  • 5+ years of PM experience
  • Experience with search or recommendation systems
  • Strong data analysis skills

jobs.title: Product Marketing Manager
jobs.content: Product marketing role focused on go-to-market strategy.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager, Platform
jobs.content: Platform PM role. Must be authorized to work in the United States.
